personas.subtitle: Default reasoning stance
personas.when_to_use: Use as an unframed baseline for study comparisons.

personas.subtitle: Strongest-objection framing
personas.when_to_use: Use when you want pressure against premature conclusions.

personas.subtitle: Explicit terms and assumptions
personas.when_to_use: Use when exact terms and assumptions must stay explicit.

personas.subtitle: Multiple approaches before committing
personas.when_to_use: Use when exploring multiple approaches matters first.
